# Averde AI

> Averde AI is Mark Bloomfield's solo consultancy in Boulder, CO, working with small businesses nationwide. It helps owners get found in AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) and deploy practical AI tools that fit how they actually work. The flagship service is the AI-Ready Website — a full rebuild with AEO content, schema markup, and local AI citations so AI engines can read, recommend, and cite the business.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://averde.ai/): What Averde AI does and who it's for.
- [How It Works](https://averde.ai/how-it-works): The AI-Ready Website build process, what's included, and a detailed FAQ.
- [Pricing](https://averde.ai/pricing): Honest, transparent pricing for the AI-Ready Website, strategy sessions, and custom builds.
- [About](https://averde.ai/about): Mark Bloomfield — engineer and founder, based in Boulder, CO.
- [AI Consulting + free AI Business Readiness Audit](https://averde.ai/ai-consulting): A free scored self-assessment of where AI can hand a small business hours back, feeding a free 30-minute planning call.
- [Custom Instructions for Claude — $27](https://averde.ai/claude-instructions): A 10-minute survey, then a Custom Instructions file written personally by Mark Bloomfield.
- [Free AI Visibility Audit](https://averde.ai/ai-audit): A free 3-minute audit that fetches a business's live website, runs 13 real checks on what AI engines read, and runs a live AI-search query for its market.
- [Case Studies](https://averde.ai/case-studies): Before-and-after AI-Ready Website rebuilds with measured AEO and SEO improvements.
- [Contact](https://averde.ai/contact): Get in touch or book a strategy call.

## Industries

- [Dental practices](https://averde.ai/industries/dental): AI-Ready Websites for dentists.
- [HVAC](https://averde.ai/industries/hvac): AI-Ready Websites for HVAC contractors.
- [Real estate](https://averde.ai/industries/real-estate): AI-Ready Websites for real estate agents.

## Free resources

- [Free resources hub](https://averde.ai/free): All free tools and resources in one place.
- [AI-Ready Website Checklist](https://averde.ai/free/ai-ready-checklist): The complete 21-item DIY checklist for making a small business website visible to AI engines — content, schema markup, and the citation graph.
- [Claude Starter Kit](https://averde.ai/free/claude-starter-kit): A fill-in-the-blanks Instructions template, ten copy-paste prompts for real business tasks, and a five-day first-week plan for small business owners setting up Claude.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://averde.ai/blog): Plain-English writing on AI search, AEO, and practical AI for small business.
- [Glossary](https://averde.ai/glossary): Plain-English definitions of AI search terms — AEO, SEO, schema markup, AI Overviews, LLMs, and more.

## Services

- AI-Ready Website — full website rebuild for AI search visibility (from $1,200).
- AI Strategy Session — a focused 90-minute working session to map an AI roadmap (from $250).
- Custom AI Build — bespoke AI around a business's data and workflows.
